authority.note: This map names mock-only composition units. JSX props, selectors, and component boundaries do not define Rust or egui public APIs.

referenceSources.notes: Archive-only parity source. React routes live under #archive/* and this source must not receive new UI decisions.
M3 structural golden and comparison source for layout, density, causality, Z, and Group meaning. Concrete color values are not product tokens.
Generative-boundary structural golden candidate; not the default component decomposition source.
State-fixture and visual mapping candidates for G0-6; no candidate fixes product token values before human review.
Small-core and plugin-responsibility learning fixture; it does not define plugin traits, custom UI APIs, or Document schema.
Retained for visual-composition comparison. New decomposition work must not treat it as the current integrated reference.
Static timeline comparison; not a product UI or golden.
State-step comparison; not a token or product UI decision.
Interaction-dynamics comparison; not an amendment of the current integrated reference.

stateOwner: Document time objects and keyframes as projection

Workspace-session candidate for horizontal scroll and per-band packing display intervals adjusted only from the small visible grips with larger hit regions integrated into the unnamed band action rail beside Inbox; never Document or Undo

Unresolved Object state projection for Solo and Mute, with rail actions materialized onto the current band Object set and all/off/mixed derived from that set; React state does not define persistence, command, evaluation, parent-child propagation, or preview/export semantics

Transient Automation expansion, channel search, key/Object selection, mutually exclusive KEYS/LAYERS mode, modular operation sections, and explicit Object/Channel/Global grouping derived from the current selection; Key Tools dock placement and size are Workspace-session candidates; prototype edits preserve easing in React state and do not define Document schema, default keys, commands, or Undo
Transient for playhead, selection, hover, and open overlays
Provider snapshot for readiness projection
components.runtimeOwnership: react-native Timeline in #plugin-browser-candidate; Inbox, Curve Shelf, and cross-surface fixture behavior retain legacy adapters during migration
components.referenceRole: one packed time plane with a visible horizontal Beat ruler, plus an unnamed narrow band action rail whose right edge, header edge, and row edges exactly align with the time-plane left edge, ruler edge, and packing-guide edges; integrated two-line grips resize only one ownerless packing band and Solo/Mute actions materialize onto every Object currently on that band; Object-bar automation triggers expand only automated channels as AE-style rows and the independent right-docked Key Tools view switches mutually between KEYS operations with explicit Object/Channel/Global grouping and LAYERS operations, borrowing Keystone 3's modular sections without occupying Browser presets or Inspector parameters; fixed Object rows, name columns, lane-owned state, focus-only replacement, all-parameter expansion, and simultaneous display of every Key/Layer section are structurally rejected
components.eguiTarget: Motolii-owned toolkit-independent timeline layout and Object state projection painted inside the egui timeline panel; JSX, CSS px, DOM scroll, and React state are not contract types

stateOwner: Workspace-session or Transient for open state

components.referenceRole: explicit Edit-Space Z projection with coincident-count stacks instead of hover fan-out, stable-ID focus synchronized from Timeline without automatic panel opening, a visible Layer Order Distribute icon with far/near preview and Reverse/Apply/Cancel, and parent-local Group scope that never mixes a Group marker with its children
components.eguiTarget: internal egui custom-painted depth rail within the timeline surface

stateOwner: Each referenced asset, review note, or background job remains in its canonical owner

components.referenceRole: one adjacent-key interval graph view with current/context key distinction, explicit Overshoot action, transient Copy, current-interval Paste, current-channel Paste all, and non-destructive advanced interval shapes (Bounce, Elastic, Cyclic/Sine, Random, Steps, Elastic Steps); Bounce, Elastic, Cyclic/Sine, and Random handle meanings are user-confirmed from captures while Steps families remain visibly labeled inferences; neither mapping defines persistence or public API; applying or adjusting a shape never adds, removes, moves, or changes the value of keyframes
components.eguiTarget: internal egui popup projecting toolkit-independent Easing Editor state and BeginHandleDrag/Preview/Commit/Cancel intents through custom curve painting; JSX, DOM selectors, SVG nodes, egui Response/Rect, px, and DPI are not contract types

components.referenceRole: shared Browser grammar with top-level Media, Create, and Effects action views; one Pack remains a single management identity while its Media, new-object, and apply-to-target items are projected by use; a dual-action item may appear in Create and Effects with one stable identity and an action-specific structural-impact preview; saved candidates always have an automatically generated poster and may add a hover or focus motion preview from Auto, Record, or GIF/Video input; extracted mock-only Search, Source rail, Collections, Results, and view-switch composition; federated All Media, Project, registered-folder, Collection, Pack, and Recent sources; independent Browse folders and recursive All files filesystem scopes; file and folder multi-selection, persistent Tag-box drop targets, and checked-tag removal; 16:9 contain-only Media thumbnails; shared D&D, selected-target double-click or Enter, and right-click context-command Commit Intent; Inspector-owned parameter description; canonical media deduplication; and non-indented hierarchy navigation
components.eguiTarget: comparison fixture for a shared internal egui Browser shell; not an adopted product component

components.referenceRole: fixed Pulse rings fixture for primary/context curves, tangent constraints, snapshot, explicit framing, and shape-preserving key insertion
components.eguiTarget: comparison screen only; not a product screen or public component
